title: Me To You Bear 4" Love You Padded Heart, Gray
features: LOVEABLE LITTLE BEAR - Tatty Teddy is holding a pretty pink heart with the simple message 'Love You'
CUTE GIFT FOR VALENTINE'S OR ANY OCCASION - whether you're buying for a boyfriend, girlfriend, husband, wife, friend or family member, this adorable plush bear is sure to be adored

BEAR SITS JUST 10CM HIGH - suitable for children over 3 as well as teenagers or adults, this seated Tatty Teddy is just the right size to display on a shelf, window sill, bedroom chair or on top of a pillow
HAND FINISHED FOR PREMIUM QUALITY - made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail to be treasured for a lifetime

GENUINE ME TO YOU GIFT – unique and instantly recognisable with grey fur, a cute blue nose and patches, Tatty Teddy has captured millions of hearts all over the world with a timeless message of love, happiness and friendship
description: From the manufacturer Bears A Me to You bear is a special gift that will be with you for a lifetime and is the perfect expression of love, friendship and happiness. There’s a cute Blue Nose bear or soft toy for every occasion.
